PythonScript.description: The Python script generated from the DAG.

ScalaCode.description: The Scala code generated from the DAG.

Errors.description: The errors encountered when trying to create the requested partitions.

Succeeded.description: A list of names of the connection definitions that were successfully deleted.

Errors.description: A map of the names of connections that were not successfully deleted to error details.
The errors encountered when trying to delete the requested partitions.
A list of errors encountered in attempting to delete the specified tables.
A list of errors encountered while trying to delete the specified table versions.

Blueprints.description: Returns a list of blueprint as a Blueprints object.

MissingBlueprints.description: Returns a list of BlueprintNames that were not found.

CrawlersNotFound.description: A list of names of crawlers that were not found.

CustomEntityTypes.description: A list of CustomEntityType objects representing the custom patterns that have been created.

CustomEntityTypesNotFound.description: A list of the names of custom patterns that were not found.

Results.description: A list of DataQualityResult objects representing the data quality results.

ResultsNotFound.description: A list of result IDs for which results were not found.

JobsNotFound.description: A list of names of jobs not found.

UnprocessedKeys.description: A list of the partition values in the request for which partitions were not returned.

Failures.description: A list of errors from the operation.

TriggersNotFound.description: A list of names of triggers not found.

MissingWorkflows.description: A list of names of workflows not found.

SuccessfulSubmissions.description: A list of the JobRuns that were successfully submitted for stopping.

Errors.description: A list of the errors that were encountered in trying to stop JobRuns, including the JobRunId for which each error was encountered and details about the error.
The errors encountered when trying to update the requested partitions. A list of BatchUpdatePartitionFailureEntry objects.

TransformId.description: The unique identifier of the machine learning transform.

TaskRunId.description: The unique identifier for the task run.

Valid.description: Return true, if the schema is valid and false otherwise.

Name.description: Returns the name of the blueprint that was registered.

CreateConnectionStatus.description: The status of the connection creation request. The request can take some time for certain authentication types, for example when creating an OAuth connection with token exchange over VPC.

Name.description: The name of the custom pattern you created.
A unique name for the data quality ruleset.

SecurityGroupIds.description: The security groups assigned to the new DevEndpoint.

SubnetId.description: The subnet ID assigned to the new DevEndpoint.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role assigned to the new DevEndpoint.

YarnEndpointAddress.description: The address of the YARN endpoint used by this DevEndpoint.

ZeppelinRemoteSparkInterpreterPort.description: The Apache Zeppelin port for the remote Apache Spark interpreter.

NumberOfNodes.description: The number of Glue Data Processing Units (DPUs) allocated to this DevEndpoint.

WorkerType.description: The type of predefined worker that is allocated to the development endpoint. May be a value of Standard, G.1X, or G.2X.

GlueVersion.description:
Glue version determines the versions of Apache Spark and Python that Glue supports. The Python version indicates the version supported for running your ETL scripts on development endpoints.

For more information about the available Glue versions and corresponding Spark and Python versions, see Glue version in the developer guide.

NumberOfWorkers.description: The number of workers of a defined workerType that are allocated to the development endpoint.

AvailabilityZone.description: The Amazon Web Services Availability Zone where this DevEndpoint is located.

VpcId.description: The ID of the virtual private cloud (VPC) used by this DevEndpoint.

ExtraPythonLibsS3Path.description: The paths to one or more Python libraries in an S3 bucket that will be loaded in your DevEndpoint.

ExtraJarsS3Path.description: Path to one or more Java .jar files in an S3 bucket that will be loaded in your DevEndpoint.

FailureReason.description: The reason for a current failure in this DevEndpoint.

SecurityConfiguration.description: The name of the SecurityConfiguration structure being used with this DevEndpoint.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The point in time at which this DevEndpoint was created.

Arguments.description:
The map of arguments used to configure this DevEndpoint.

Valid arguments are:

  • "--enable-glue-datacatalog": ""

You can specify a version of Python support for development endpoints by using the Arguments parameter in the CreateDevEndpoint or UpdateDevEndpoint APIs. If no arguments are provided, the version defaults to Python 2.

ApplicationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Identity Center application that was created for the Glue configuration.

SourceArn.description: The ARN of the source resource for the integration.

TargetArn.description: The ARN of the target resource for the integration.

IntegrationName.description: A unique name for an integration in Glue.

IntegrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the created integration.

KmsKeyId.description: The ARN of a KMS key used for encrypting the channel.

AdditionalEncryptionContext.description: An optional set of non-secret key–value pairs that contains additional contextual information for encryption.

Tags.description: Metadata assigned to the resource consisting of a list of key-value pairs.

Status.description:
The status of the integration being created.

The possible statuses are:

  • CREATING: The integration is being created.

  • ACTIVE: The integration creation succeeds.

  • MODIFYING: The integration is being modified.

  • FAILED: The integration creation fails.

  • DELETING: The integration is deleted.

  • SYNCING: The integration is synchronizing.

  • NEEDS_ATTENTION: The integration needs attention, such as synchronization.

CreateTime.description: The time when the integration was created, in UTC.

Errors.description: A list of errors associated with the integration creation.

DataFilter.description: Selects source tables for the integration using Maxwell filter syntax.

ResourceArn.description: The connection ARN of the source, or the database ARN of the target.

ResourcePropertyArn.description: The resource ARN created through this create API. The format is something like arn:aws:glue:<region>:<account_id>:integrationresourceproperty/*

SourceProcessingProperties.description: The resource properties associated with the integration source.

TargetProcessingProperties.description: The resource properties associated with the integration target.

Name.description: The unique name that was provided for this job definition.

TransformId.description: A unique identifier that is generated for the transform.

RegistryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the newly created registry.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the registry.

SchemaArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the schema.

Description.description: A description of the schema if specified when created.

DataFormat.description: The data format of the schema definition. Currently AVRO, JSON and PROTOBUF are supported.

SchemaCheckpoint.description: The version number of the checkpoint (the last time the compatibility mode was changed).

LatestSchemaVersion.description: The latest version of the schema associated with the returned schema definition.

NextSchemaVersion.description: The next version of the schema associated with the returned schema definition.

SchemaVersionId.description: The unique identifier of the first schema version.

SchemaVersionStatus.description: The status of the first schema version created.

Name.description: The name assigned to the new security configuration.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The time at which the new security configuration was created.

Session.description: Returns the session object in the response.

Name.description: The name of the usage profile that was created.
The name of the workflow which was provided as part of the request.
Returns the name of the blueprint that was deleted.
The name of the custom pattern you deleted.

SourceArn.description: The ARN of the source for the integration.

TargetArn.description: The ARN of the target for the integration.

IntegrationName.description: A unique name for an integration in Glue.

IntegrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the integration.

KmsKeyId.description: The ARN of a KMS key used for encrypting the channel.

AdditionalEncryptionContext.description: An optional set of non-secret key–value pairs that contains additional contextual information for encryption.

Tags.description: Metadata assigned to the resource consisting of a list of key-value pairs.

Status.description:
The status of the integration being deleted.

The possible statuses are:

  • CREATING: The integration is being created.

  • ACTIVE: The integration creation succeeds.

  • MODIFYING: The integration is being modified.

  • FAILED: The integration creation fails.

  • DELETING: The integration is deleted.

  • SYNCING: The integration is synchronizing.

  • NEEDS_ATTENTION: The integration needs attention, such as synchronization.

CreateTime.description: The time when the integration was created, in UTC.

Errors.description: A list of errors associated with the integration.

DataFilter.description: Selects source tables for the integration using Maxwell filter syntax.

JobName.description: The name of the job definition that was deleted.

TransformId.description: The unique identifier of the transform that was deleted.

RegistryName.description: The name of the registry being deleted.

RegistryArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the registry being deleted.

Status.description: The status of the registry. A successful operation will return the Deleting status.

SchemaArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the schema being deleted.

SchemaName.description: The name of the schema being deleted.

SchemaVersionErrors.description: A list of SchemaVersionErrorItem objects, each containing an error and schema version.

Id.description: Returns the ID of the deleted session.

Name.description: The name of the trigger that was deleted.
Name of the workflow specified in input.

SourceArn.description: The ARN of the source for the integration.

TargetArn.description: The ARN of the target for the integration.

IntegrationName.description: A unique name for an integration in Glue.

AdditionalEncryptionContext.description: An optional set of non-secret key–value pairs that contains additional contextual information for encryption.

Tags.description: Metadata assigned to the resource consisting of a list of key-value pairs.

Status.description:
The status of the integration being modified.

The possible statuses are:

  • CREATING: The integration is being created.

  • ACTIVE: The integration creation succeeds.

  • MODIFYING: The integration is being modified.

  • FAILED: The integration creation fails.

  • DELETING: The integration is deleted.

  • SYNCING: The integration is synchronizing.

  • NEEDS_ATTENTION: The integration needs attention, such as synchronization.

CreateTime.description: The time when the integration was created, in UTC.

Errors.description: A list of errors associated with the integration modification.

DataFilter.description: Selects source tables for the integration using Maxwell filter syntax.

IntegrationConfig.description: The updated configuration settings for the integration.

PolicyHash.description: A hash of the policy that has just been set. This must be included in a subsequent call that overwrites or updates this policy.

SchemaArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the schema.

SchemaVersionId.description: The unique version ID of the schema version.
The unique ID that represents the version of this schema.

VersionNumber.description: The version of this schema (for sync flow only, in case this is the first version).

SchemaArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the schema.

SchemaVersionId.description: The version ID for the schema version.

RunId.description: The new ID assigned to the resumed workflow run. Each resume of a workflow run will have a new run ID.

NodeIds.description: A list of the node IDs for the nodes that were actually restarted.

Id.description: Returns the Id of the statement that was run.

RunId.description: The run ID for this blueprint run.

ColumnStatisticsTaskRunId.description: The identifier for the column statistics task run.

The unique run identifier associated with this run.

TaskRunId.description: The unique identifier associated with this run.
The unique run identifier that is associated with this task run.

Name.description: The name of the trigger that was started.
